svg.aria-label: Weekly digest cover 2026.01.22: K8s 82% Production, VS Code Tunnel Abuse, NTLMv1 Rainbow Tables
svg.title: Cloud Security Jan 2026: K8s 82% prod, VS Code tunnel abuse, CRI-O audit

g.text: CNCF survey shows Kubernetes hits 82 percent production
VS Code remote tunnel feature abused as a covert
Net-NTLMv1 rainbow tables published and CRI-O audit
